item.title: Patients and GPs Unite Over NHS ‘Maze’
item.description: GPs are spending up to a third of their time on paperwork, as patients and doctors warn that NHS bureaucracy is undermining care. Medscape News UK

item.title: BMA Challenges Scotland’s Consultant Vacancy Figures
item.description: Doctors say FOI data reveal far more vacant consultant posts in NHS Scotland than official figures suggest, raising concerns over waiting lists and pa...

item.title: Does HRT Lower Osteoporosis Risk?
item.description: New research suggests early initiation of hormone replacement therapy could protect bone health. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Early Neonatal Infection Linked to Cognitive Risk Later
item.description: Early-onset neonatal infection is linked to higher risks for intellectual disability and special educational needs during childhood, with meningitis c...

item.title: Gut Infection Disease Care: From GP Clinics to Hospitals
item.description: An infectious intestinal disease episode can be noted in both primary care and hospital admissions, with children and older adults having higher odds ...
